content: Just as human language learners use lexical reflection (the common educational definition of reflexion) to deepen implicit understanding of word usage and contextual meaning, we can embed a lightweight vocabulary-grounded reflexion step into the LLM Self-Refine iterative pipeline to reduce hallucinated non-standard output. This combined framework leverages the human learning principle of reflexive vocabulary grounding to make Self-Refine's iterative improvements more aligned with conventional usage norms.
